scripts.tailwind:build: bun run icons:build && bun run tailwind:scan && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i tailwind.input.css -o assets/css/site.css
scripts.build: bun run icons:build && bun run ./scripts/write-runtime-config.mjs --out public/runtime-config.js && bun run tailwind:scan && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i tailwind.input.css -o public/css/site.css --minify
